nodes.name: backend.mdc
nodes.summary: Cursor rule file scoping backend-specific agent guidance for the edpath-backend Express + LangGraph app.

nodes.name: core.mdc
nodes.summary: Always-on Cursor core rules that route to AGENTS.md and enforce docs-first, deterministic-workflow, no-scope-creep working style.

nodes.name: schemas.mdc
nodes.summary: Cursor rule file guiding work on the shared packages/schemas Zod contracts used by both backend and web.

nodes.name: web.mdc
nodes.summary: Cursor rule file scoping frontend-specific agent guidance for the Next.js edpath-web app.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-pattern configuration for the Understand-Anything analyzer, excluding build artifacts and vendored paths from the knowledge-graph scan.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Explains the agent/lib directory of shared helper utilities used across the LangGraph teaching-workflow nodes.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Overview of the LangGraph agent package documenting the node map, subfolders, and control-flow invariants of the deterministic teaching workflow.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the agent/state directory that defines the checkpointed EdPath graph state object serving as the single source of truth.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the agent/types directory holding TypeScript type definitions internal to the agent package.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Explains the config directory that centralizes environment variable loading and runtime configuration for the backend.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the copilot directory that wires the CopilotKit Runtime bridging the LangGraph agent to the web UI.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Describes the evaluators directory split into deterministic checks and llm-judge scorers used by the evaluation harness.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Overview of the evals package covering how to run the evaluation pipeline, its stages, and subfolder layout.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the features directory that groups vertical backend feature slices such as start and upload.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file for the start feature, re-exporting the route handlers, middleware, and service functions that begin a lesson thread.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure TypeScript re-export barrel aggregating start.route and start.service.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the start feature flow and behavior for beginning a lesson from an approved plan via a validated thread id.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file for the upload feature, re-exporting the PDF extraction, cleaning, token estimation, route, and service pipeline plus their types.
nodes.languageNotes: Re-export barrel that separates runtime exports from `export type` declarations for upload pipeline types.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the upload feature flow, key files, and boundaries for extracting and cleaning PDF text into the initial graph state.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the src/lib directory of app-wide backend helper utilities.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level backend source overview mapping the folder layout, entry points, and core invariants of the EdPath backend.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for the backend test suite, registering the setup file and excluding dist and node_modules from test runs.

nodes.name: vitest.setup.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest global setup that loads .env and forces deterministic test defaults by disabling LangSmith tracing and blanking the OpenAI key unless EVAL_LLM is set.
nodes.languageNotes: Sets OPENAI_API_KEY to "" rather than deleting it so dotenv's no-overwrite behavior keeps live-LLM calls off during tests.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the web api directory purpose, contents, and how it fits into the CopilotKit-driven frontend.

nodes.name: globals.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind and shared design tokens, and mapping CSS variables into theme colors, fonts, and radius scales for the web app.
nodes.languageNotes: Tailwind v4 CSS-first config using @theme inline and @custom-variant to bind repo design tokens to utility color scales.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the Next.js app directory purpose, contents, and how the route layout and styling fit into the frontend.
